message:
test(conformance): add stdlib_sort and stdlib_numeric fixture tests

Add fixture-based conformance tests for stdlib functions:
- stdlib_sort: qsort and bsearch (3 cases)
- stdlib_numeric: atoi, strtol, strtoul (10 cases)

Test count: 92 → 94 passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
